title: TierTagger (OuterTiers)
description: Shows OuterTiers, MCTiers, PvPTiers and SubTiers ranks next to player names in the tab list and as a nametag badge above their head. Client-side, no server install required.
body:
# TierTagger

A client-side mod that shows **MCTiers**, **OuterTiers**, **PvPTiers** and **SubTiers** rankings directly in Minecraft, in the tab list and above player heads.

No server installation needed. Works on any server.

---

## Features

**Tab list** — tier badges appear next to every player's name when you open the tab list. Supports dual badges to show two different tier lists side by side.

**Nametag** — a badge floats above each player's head in-world. Toggle on/off with F5. Gamemode-aware, so it always shows the relevant tier for the server you're on.

**Commands**
- `/tiertagger search <player>` — see a player's full tier breakdown across all services and gamemodes
- `/tiertagger compare <player1> <player2>` — compare two players side by side
- `/tiertagger help` — list all available commands

**Settings** — fully configurable in-game via Mod Menu. Customize colors, which tier lists to show, badge format, cache duration, and more.

---

## Install

1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for your Minecraft version
2. Add [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to your mods folder
3. Drop TierTagger in and launch

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is optional but gives you access to the in-game settings screen.

---

[GitHub](https://github.com/blackdmega-wq/tiertagger-public) · [Discord](https://discord.gg/6eAaPqg4up)
